_doc: Runtime selector-gate registry for the GoHighLevel browser builder (D8). Each gate is a UI node the builder must act on. status=captured means a real, live-snapshot-verified DOM node (do NOT re-snapshot blindly, but DO verify it still matches). status=runtime means the node is NOT DOM-captured and MUST be resolved at runtime by snapshotting the live DOM and picking the ref. The `find` hints are accessibility-role/name/visible-text search seeds for `agent-browser find ...`, NOT confirmed CSS. NO invented CSS may ship as fact. NEW (v13.2.4, D8): the `label` field now carries the REAL visible label + sequence wired from the operator's 15 live screenshots (Downloads/ghl-ui-map.md). `label_source` tells you whether that label is screenshot-confirmed-label (from the UI map) or still-runtime-snapshot (no screenshot yet). A screenshot-confirmed label is a visible-text/role target the agent confirms at runtime — it removes the GUESSING, it does NOT replace the runtime @ref capture.

_legend.captured: Live-snapshot-verified real DOM node (2026-06-21 capture pass).
_legend.runtime: MUST capture-at-runtime: snapshot the live DOM, pick the @ref, act. Never hardcode invented CSS.

label_source.screenshot-confirmed-label: Visible label + position verified against the operator's 15 live screenshots (Downloads/ghl-ui-map.md, 2026-06-21). Target this exact visible text/role; confirm the @ref at runtime.
label_source.live-confirmed-label: Visible label + sequence verified by an END-TO-END LIVE RUN (2026-06-21 D10/D11 pass, BlackCEO LLC operator test fixture). The selector/flow was actually driven and produced the documented result (page saved + preview HTTP 200 + marker/embed rendered). Still resolve the live @ref at runtime; the engine limits (cross-origin iframe, real-pointer double-click-add) are noted inline.
label_source.still-runtime-snapshot: No screenshot for this node yet. Snapshot the live DOM and resolve from the find-seed; label is a hint only.

_capture_pass: 2026-06-21 READ-ONLY pass, app.convertandflow.com, agent-browser 0.27.0, --session ghl-capture. HARD-BLOCKED at login by two-factor authentication: gates 1 and 27 are DOM-captured; gates 2-26 and 28 remain runtime snapshot-gates. SEPARATELY, the 2026-06-21 UI-MAP pass (15 screenshots, Downloads/ghl-ui-map.md) confirmed the VISIBLE LABELS + sequence for the funnel flow — those gates now carry screenshot-confirmed-label. The agent still resolves the live @ref at runtime. PENDING-LIVE-RUN for the end-to-end build.

_runtime_gate_baseline._doc: END-TO-END runtime BUILD-OUTCOME baseline, promoted runtime -> captured on the strength of the 2026-06-21 Funnel-Factory re-run (A4-GATE-CAPTURE). DISTINCT from the per-gate `status` field above: `status` (captured=2 / runtime=26) tracks DOM-SELECTOR capture and is unchanged by this block. THIS block records the build-OUTCOME gates (preview HTTP 200 + marker present + asset renders + draft-not-published) that each build METHOD achieved on a real live run. `outcome_status` values mirror the gate legend: `captured` = verified live this run; `runtime` = not yet driven end-to-end. Every value here is supported by independent-curl / API evidence in A4-GATE-CAPTURE; NO value is asserted without that evidence. Operator fixture only: BlackCEO LLC test sub-account (FIXTURE0LOCATION0000), the operator's own box — NO client data.
_runtime_gate_baseline._evidence_source: A4-GATE-CAPTURE (2026-06-21 Funnel-Factory re-run, BlackCEO LLC operator test fixture). Auth: token-only (Firebase refresh-token seed), headless, NO UI login / NO two-factor. Marker: ZHC-FACTORY-FUNNEL-0621.

REST_autosave.label: Funnel / Page / Website builder — REST autosave (token-id GET /funnels/page + POST /funnels/builder/autosave; the cracked canvas-REST path, ghl_rest_canvas wired into ghl_builder.emit_rest_save_plan). Adds the image_renders gate (in-page CDN HTTP 200).
REST_autosave._note: NOT YET driven end-to-end by the T1 wire-in (T1 is mock-unit-test only: NO live GHL, NO git). The read->splice->autosave->verify->revert recipe is PROVEN live in the headless-canvas solution doc (raw evidence: save_result.json 201, verify_write.json marker landed, byte-identical revert) — but THIS method's outcome_status stays `runtime` until the wired emit_rest_save_plan is driven end-to-end against the operator fixture under a fresh RUN_ID in the durable skill6-fix evidence root. NO fabrication: do not flip to `captured`/PASS without that fresh receipt.

preview_http_200.evidence: verify_url(preview_url, marker) emitted by emit_rest_save_plan step 'verify_preview'; not yet driven end-to-end via the wired path

marker_present.evidence: marker spliced into rawCustomCode by edit_element_customcode; verify_url asserts marker-in-body; not yet driven end-to-end via the wired path

image_renders.evidence: in-page > must return HTTP 200; the CDN url comes from the services.* media-upload (T2), referenced via the autosave splice; not yet driven end-to-end

draft_not_published.evidence: autosave_body pageType='draft' by default; may_publish() gates publish; live pageVersion pointer never moves on a draft; not yet driven end-to-end

token_only_auth.evidence: token-id header (minted Firebase id_token), no Authorization: Bearer, no UI login / no two-factor; staged via python-written JS file (never bash ${VAR@Q}); not yet driven end-to-end via the wired path

exact_location_verified.evidence: emit_rest_save_plan gates the whole plan behind subaccount_matches(current_location_id, <configured GHL location id>) — MISMATCH emits zero steps; not yet driven end-to-end via the wired path

_runtime_gate_baseline._note: Three build methods (A raw-code funnel/page, B vercel-embed, C website page) hold a live end-to-end runtime PASS on the operator fixture (outcome_status `captured`). The REST_autosave method is the cracked canvas-REST path wired in by T1 (ghl_rest_canvas -> ghl_builder.emit_rest_save_plan); its outcome_status is `runtime` (PENDING-LIVE-RUN) because T1 is mock-unit-test only and the wired path has NOT yet been driven end-to-end (the underlying recipe is proven live in the headless-canvas solution doc, but this method only flips to `captured` on a fresh end-to-end receipt under the durable skill6-fix evidence root). This block does NOT alter the 28-entry `gates` array or its captured/runtime counts (still 2 captured / 26 runtime, as the install QC asserts). Per-gate DOM selectors remain resolve-at-runtime; what is captured/runtime here is the build OUTCOME each method produces.

_label_coverage._note: 19 gates carry a screenshot-confirmed visible label (the full funnel-build click-path, gates 1+3-11+13-21). 4 gates (23-26, the Websites + Mode-2 embed flow) are now LIVE-CONFIRMED by the 2026-06-21 D10/D11 end-to-end run on the BlackCEO LLC operator test fixture (Website created + page built + Code element + preview HTTP 200 + marker rendered; Mode-2 iframe embed rendered live through preview). The Website builder is the SAME editor as the Funnel builder, with the URL/label/flow DIFFERENCES recorded inline on gate 25. Gate 12 (editor iframe boundary) is structural with no visible label. Gate 22 (funnel-list row) and gate 28 (published-page origin) remain runtime. Gate 27 is auth-storage (DOM-captured, no visible label).

login_route.note: CAPTURED 2026-06-21: the login FORM mounts ONLY at root '/'. The '/login' path renders a permanently-blank 'Initializing...' shell in automated Chromium (the form component never mounts). Always navigate to root.

gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: the 'Create new funnel' modal has THREE cards — 'From blank' (carries the 'Funnel name *' input), 'Build with AI' (Beta), 'From templates'. Use 'From blank'. Blank choice ALSO exists later at the step CONTROL box (gate 10) — support both.

gates.find: find role button name Create (inside the 'Create new funnel' / 'From blank' modal)
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: 'Create' button on the From-blank card.

gates.name: add_new_step
gates.label: + Add new step or import (blue, inside the funnel)
gates.find: find role button name 'Add new step or import' | find text '+ Add new step or import' (blue)
gates.note: CORRECTED by UI map: it is ONE blue button '+ Add new step or import' — Import is NOT a separate button; it is an 'Import from ClickFunnels' URL field INSIDE the next modal. Match the full visible label; never a substring.

gates.name: step_name_and_path_inputs
gates.label: 'New step in funnel' modal -> 'Name for page' input + 'Path' input
gates.find: find role heading name 'New step in funnel' | find role textbox name 'Name for page' | find role textbox name 'Path'
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: the page-name field is labeled 'Name for page' (NOT 'Step Name'). Path lowercase/hyphenated, unique within funnel. Modal also has the optional 'Import from ClickFunnels' URL field.

gates.name: blank_template
gates.label: Step CONTROL box: 'Use existing' (blue) | 'Create from blank' -> click 'Create funnel step'
gates.find: find role button name 'Create funnel step' | within control box find text 'Create from blank' (vs 'Use existing')
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: the step's CONTROL box shows 'Use existing' (blue) and 'Create from blank'. Use 'Create from blank' for a NEW page, then 'Create funnel step'. The box bottom has an 'Edit' dropdown that re-opens an existing page = the EDIT path (gate 11).

gates.name: edit_page
gates.label: 'Edit' dropdown at the step CONTROL box bottom (re-opens an existing page)
gates.find: find role button name Edit (control box bottom) | dropdown -> open editor
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: 'Edit' is a dropdown at the bottom of the step control box — it is the UPDATE/edit path (A14), distinct from 'Create from blank'.

gates.name: editor_iframe_boundary
gates.label: Page-builder editor frame (canvas)
gates.find: frame @ref | frame main
gates.note: agent-browser 0.27.0 auto-inlines iframes into the snapshot and exposes 'frame @ref' / 'frame main' — scope into the nested editor frame; never assume top frame. No visible label (structural).

gates.name: add_section_blank
gates.label: Canvas 'Blank Section' (center: 'Blank Section' | 'Insert Element' | 'Generate with AI') -> green Section with a '+ Add' button inside
gates.find: find text 'Blank Section' | after insert find role button name 'Add' (the '+ Add' inside the section)
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: click 'Blank Section' to drop an empty green Section; it shows a '+ Add' button inside (opens Quick Add, gate 15) plus a '+' below it to add another section.

gates.name: full_width_toggle
gates.label: Section panel toggle 'Allow Rows to take entire width'
gates.find: find text 'Allow Rows to take entire width' (Section right-panel, General/Styles tabs)
gates.note: CONFIRMED by UI map — the label is 'Allow Rows to take entire width' (NOT 'take up full length'). Resolves the prior ambiguity. Still verify by TOGGLE STATE (on), not label text alone. Section panel also has Sticky + Background (Color/Image/Video).

gates.name: code_element
gates.label: Quick Add panel -> 'Custom' group -> 'Code' (</> icon) -> drops a 'Custom Code' element ('<> Custom HTML/Javascript') inside a '1 Column Row'
gates.find: open Quick Add (gate 13 '+ Add') | scroll to 'Custom' group | find text 'Code' (</> icon)
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed path: '+ Add' -> Quick Add panel (left groups: Quick Add, Sections, Rows, Elements, Prebuilt Sections, Saved Assets, Widget Marketplace, Buttons, Forms And Surveys, Social Media Icons, Countdown Timers, Images, Progress Bar) -> scroll to 'Custom' group -> 'Code'. Element label on canvas = 'Custom Code'.

gates.name: code_editor_instance
gates.label: Custom Code element -> right-panel 'Open Code Editor' -> modal 'Custom Javascript/HTML' (dark textarea, placeholder 'Add your code here')
gates.find: click 'Custom Code' element (right panel header 'Custom Code') | find role button name 'Open Code Editor' | then locate the 'Custom Javascript/HTML' modal textarea
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: clicking the element shows right-panel header 'Custom Code' with an 'Open Code Editor' button; that opens the 'Custom Javascript/HTML' modal. Set large payloads via the editor's value API (eval), NOT key-by-key typing. The modal renders on the MAIN page, not inside the builder iframe.

gates.name: code_element_save
gates.label: Save (inside the 'Custom Javascript/HTML' code modal)
gates.find: find role button name Save (within the 'Custom Javascript/HTML' modal)
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: paste HTML into the modal textarea, then click 'Save' to commit the code element.

gates.name: dismiss_ai_popup
gates.label: 'Ask AI' left panel (Assist/Build tabs, greeting 'Hi <user>, let us set the foundations') -> close via its X
gates.find: find text 'Ask AI' then its X | find text 'let us set the foundations' | find role button name Close (Ask AI panel)
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: the editor opens with the 'Ask AI' panel on the left (Assist/Build tabs; greeting personalizes to the logged-in user, so match on 'Ask AI' / 'let us set the foundations', not the name). Close it via its X on first editor open or it eats the next click. Absent is fine — do not crash.

gates.name: page_save
gates.label: Top-right disk/save icon (note: 'Autosave off' -> manual save required)
gates.find: find role button name Save | top-right disk icon
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: save is the top-right DISK icon; autosave is OFF so a manual save is required. Wait for the save-confirmation toast, not a fixed sleep.

gates.name: preview
gates.label: Top-right EYE icon (Preview)
gates.find: find role button name Preview | top-right eye icon
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: preview is the top-right EYE icon. Preview URL pattern uses the configured preview domain (see _env preview_domain).

gates.name: publish
gates.label: Top-right blue 'Publish' button (APPROVAL ONLY; default leave draft)
gates.find: find role button name Publish (top-right, blue)
gates.note: Screenshot-confirmed: blue 'Publish' button top-right. NEVER act on this gate without an explicit LIVE approval answer (A13.1).

gates.name: funnel_list_row_open
gates.label: Funnel row in the Funnels list (open by exact funnel name)
gates.find: open by funnel_workspace_url (preferred) | find text <exact funnel name> in list row
gates.note: List row not individually screenshotted; prefer opening by the captured funnel_workspace_url.

gates.name: tab_websites
gates.label: Websites (same orange top-tab row as Funnels)
gates.find: find text Websites (orange top-tab row) -> it is an ANCHOR <a href='.../funnels-websites/websites'>, NOT an ARIA role=tab (find role tab name Websites MISSES it). Click the <a> whose trimmed text == 'Websites'.
gates.note: LIVE-CONFIRMED (D11, 2026-06-21, BlackCEO LLC operator test fixture): the Websites tab IS in the same top-tab row as Funnels (row: Funnels|Stores|Webinars|Analytics|Quizzes|QR Codes|Websites|Blogs|WordPress|Client Portal|Forms|Surveys). IMPORTANT: it is an anchor element with href '/v2/location/<LOCID>/funnels-websites/websites' — NOT role=tab. Resolve the @ref at runtime by exact anchor text 'Websites'.

gates.name: new_website_button_and_name
gates.label: + New website (top-right, blue) -> 'Create new website' modal -> 'From blank' card -> 'Website name *' input (placeholder 'e.g. Sales website') -> 'Create' button
gates.find: find text '+ New website' (top-right blue button; do NOT click adjacent 'Build with AI') -> modal heading 'Create new website' -> within 'From blank' card fill input[placeholder='e.g. Sales website'] -> click 'Create' (bottom-right; 'Cancel' beside it)
gates.note: LIVE-CONFIRMED (D11, 2026-06-21, BlackCEO LLC operator test fixture): button label is 'New website' (with + icon). Differs from Funnels: the 'Create new website' modal has TWO cards only — 'From blank' (carries the 'Website name *' input, placeholder 'e.g. Sales website') and 'From templates' — NO 'Build with AI' card inside the modal (that is a separate top-right button). After 'Create' the SPA navigates to '/v2/location/<LOCID>/funnels-websites/websites/<WEBSITE_ID>/pages' (the website DETAIL view), NOT directly into a builder.

gates.name: website_editor_selectors
gates.label: Website detail (sub-tabs Pages|Stats|Sales|Security|Events|Settings) -> '+ Add new page' -> 'New page for website' modal ('Name for page *' + 'Path' + ClickFunnels import) -> 'Create new page' -> page CONTROL box ('Use existing' | 'Create from blank') -> 'Create from blank' opens the builder. Builder MIRRORS the Funnel editor.
gates.find: website detail: click '+ Add new page' (blue, top-right) -> fill input[placeholder='Name for page'] + input[placeholder='Path'] -> click 'Create new page' -> on the page control box click 'Create from blank' -> builder opens at '/location/<LOCID>/page-builder/<PAGE_ID>?source=website'. Then gates 13-21 analogues (Blank Section/Quick Add/Custom>Code/Open Code Editor/Save/Preview/Publish) work IDENTICALLY to the Funnel editor.
gates.note: LIVE-CONFIRMED (D11, 2026-06-21, BlackCEO LLC operator test fixture): the website page builder is the SAME editor as the Funnel builder (same toolbar: Autosave-off, top-right eye=Preview, disk=Save, blue Publish; same 'Ask AI' panel with a 'Close Ask AI' button; same canvas 'Blank Section'/'Insert Element'/'Generate with AI'; same Quick Add panel -> 'Custom' group -> 'Code' (</> => 'Custom HTML/Javascript' element) -> right-panel 'Open Code Editor' (renders on MAIN page) -> 'Custom Javascript/HTML' modal with a CodeMirror editor -> 'Save'). DIFFERENCES from Funnels: (a) website page-builder URL carries '?source=website'; (b) the page-create button is 'Add new page' / 'Create new page' (Funnel uses 'Add new step or import' / 'Create funnel step'); (c) creating a website page returns to the Pages list with a CONTROL box (does NOT auto-open the builder — click 'Create from blank'). ENGINE LIMITS (same as Funnel): the canvas + Quick Add live in a CROSS-ORIGIN iframe (page-builder.leadconnectorhq.com) whose interior the a11y snapshot does NOT enumerate; the section '+' Add and the Code tile must be driven by REAL pointer events (double-click-add) — synthetic JS clicks / drag do NOT land. Set the CodeMirror value via its API (.CodeMirror.setValue) inside the editor frame, not key-by-key. Preview URL pattern: https://www.<preview-domain>/preview/<PAGE_ID> (verified HTTP 200 + marker rendered).

gates.name: code_element_iframe_embed
gates.label: Same 'Custom Code' element as gate 15/16; payload = single responsive <iframe>
gates.find: same as gate 15 (Code element) -> gate 16 (Open Code Editor); set CodeMirror value to a single responsive <iframe src=<embeddable-url>>; gate 17 Save; gate 19 Save page; gate 20 Preview.
gates.note: LIVE-CONFIRMED (D10, 2026-06-21, BlackCEO LLC operator test fixture): Mode 2 path works end-to-end. Payload '<section><iframe ... src="<EMBEDDABLE_URL>" style="width:100%;height:600px;border:0"></iframe></section>' set via CodeMirror -> Save -> page Save -> Preview rendered the embedded page LIVE (embed child-frame HTTP 200, real content). HARD REQUIREMENT: the embed target must be a PUBLIC URL with NO X-Frame-Options:DENY and NO restrictive CSP frame-ancestors. NOTE on Vercel: default Vercel deployment-protection (SSO) returns HTTP 401 + 'x-frame-options: DENY' + a _vercel_sso_nonce cookie => NOT embeddable; only a public (protection-disabled) Vercel deployment with no frame-blocking headers can be embedded. Verify the target's headers (curl -D-) BEFORE building; if it blocks framing, the embed renders BLANK and the operator must set the source app's headers (gate 28 frame-ancestors) or pick a public URL.

gates.name: auth_storage_keys
gates.label: (no visible UI label — IndexedDB auth storage)

captured.fbase_key_format: firebase:authUser:<apiKey>:<appName> (appName='[DEFAULT]'; CONFIRMED verbatim via Firebase JS SDK _persistenceKeyName + the live store)
captured.value_shape: FULL Firebase Web SDK User record (User._fromJSON): { uid, emailVerified:false, isAnonymous:false, providerData:[], stsTokenManager:{refreshToken, accessToken, expirationTime(epoch MILLIS)}, createdAt(string), lastLoginAt(string), apiKey, appName:'[DEFAULT]' }. email/displayName/photoURL OMITTED (undefined) — this is a custom-auth user (sign_in_provider=custom) with no such fields; setting them null fails the SDK string|undefined assertion.
captured.localStorage: deviceId, proxyLoginCount, debug_sentry, locale (NO token; not auth-bearing — do NOT need to seed)
captured.firebase_api_key: AIzaSyB_w3vXmsI7WeQtrIOkjR6xTRVN5uOieiE (hardcoded in Skill 44 transport.py; not an env var)

gates.note: CORRECTS the GOAL spec §2.4 which assumed localStorage. Auth is in IndexedDB. The Firebase refresh token ALONE logs the SPA in: seed-ghl-auth.py mints a fresh id_token from the refresh token and emits the FULL User record above; inject-ghl-auth.sh writes it (and reads it back to confirm). ROOT-CAUSE FIX (auth/internal-error): the record now ALWAYS carries emailVerified:false + isAnonymous:false (the SDK asserts both as booleans; omitting them threw INTERNAL_ERROR and bounced the SPA to the login form). NO app-token and NO session cookie are required — the id_token validates directly via the token-id header. HARD RULE: TOKEN-SEED IS THE ONLY AUTH PATH — there is NO automatic UI-login / two-factor fallback. If the seed fails to log in, the builder STOPS and reports (non-zero); the operator re-grabs a fresh refresh token (Token Grabber) and retries. GHL_AGENCY_EMAIL/PASSWORD is a documented MANUAL last resort only, never auto-invoked.

gates.name: ghl_published_domain_for_frame_ancestors
gates.label: (no UI label — read the published page's own origin)
gates.find: read the published page's own origin after first publish
gates.note: Only knowable from a published page. Whitelist it in the Vercel app's frame-ancestors / X-Frame-Options for Mode 2 embeds.

_enforcement_gates._doc: Build-enforcement gates — these are NOT DOM-selector gates (they do not appear in the 'gates' array and do not affect the captured=2/runtime=26 counts). They are POLICY gates that a build must satisfy before it can be marked done. Each entry has 'required':true (hard gate — build is blocked on failure) or 'required':false (warn-only). These gates are checked by guard scripts in 06-ghl-install-pages/scripts/ and by ghl_gate.py (the authoritative pass reader). They were added 2026-06-26 in response to the pre-flight fabrication incident: a run hand-wrote ledger.json to claim PASS when the machine had recorded FAIL on every page. The guards make that bypass structurally impossible.
_enforcement_gates._incident_ref: Pre-flight report: SKILL6-PREFLIGHT-FAILURE-DIAGNOSTIC.md — both builds FAILED (website HTTP 500 on every page: 'Cannot read properties of undefined reading colors'; funnel pages blank). A hand-written summary claimed PASS. These gates prevent recurrence.

method_decision_per_page._doc: PLAN-3 — Method-decision architecture gate. Every built page must have a routing/method-decision-<page>.json file with a non-empty 'method' field ('direct' or 'vercel') and a non-empty 'reason' field (>=20 chars) justifying the choice. A build cannot be marked done without this file. Enforced by 06-ghl-install-pages/scripts/guard-ghl-method-decision.sh.
method_decision_per_page.checked_by: guard-ghl-method-decision.sh (--static for CI; --run-dir <path> for live runs)

method_rules.direct: Native GoHighLevel page: HTML FRAGMENT (not a full <!DOCTYPE html> document) inside a Custom Code element. Saved via ghl_rest_canvas / ghl_builder. Use when the page is simple enough that GoHighLevel's renderer will not conflict with the markup. The page blob MUST include a populated defaultSettings.colors theme object and a full section->row->column->element nesting; an empty settings:{} blob causes HTTP 500 on every page load.
method_rules.vercel: Vercel-hosted page embedded into GoHighLevel via a responsive <iframe> in a Custom Code element (Skill 06 Mode 2, gate 26). Use ONLY when the page is rich or complex enough that GoHighLevel's styling conflicts with the markup. REQUIREMENTS: the Vercel deployment must be public (deployment protection disabled), must carry permissive frame-ancestors headers (no X-Frame-Options: DENY), and the vercel_url field in the method-decision file must be populated. Verify headers with curl -D- before building. Default to 'direct'; escalate to 'vercel' only when necessary.

method_decision_per_page.non_gate: A missing routing/method-decision-<page>.json is not a warn — it is a hard build block. The gate cannot be satisfied by a hand-written ledger or a build summary; the file must be on disk in the run's routing/ directory.
method_decision_per_page.ci_mode: In hermetic CI (--static), this gate checks only that gates.json contains this entry with required:true. The per-page file check only runs in --run-dir mode (live builds).

image_manifest_non_empty._doc: PLAN-4 FIX-2/FIX-4 — Image pipeline gate. A build is blocked from being marked done if images/manifest.json is absent OR contains zero records OR any record lacks an https URL with a verified HTTP 200 response. The real image pipeline (generate via Kie.ai gpt-image-2 -> verify PNG -> upload to GoHighLevel CDN -> embed -> confirm CDN URL returns HTTP 200) must run. An empty images/ folder is a hard FAIL, not a warn.
image_manifest_non_empty.checked_by: ghl_gate.py require-pass (reads images/manifest.json and asserts non-empty with https+200 records)

manifest_schema._doc: Each record in images/manifest.json must carry these fields to satisfy the gate.
manifest_schema.image_id: string — unique ID for this image in the build
manifest_schema.local_path: string — absolute path to the verified PNG on disk
manifest_schema.cdn_url: string — public GoHighLevel CDN URL (must start with https://)
manifest_schema.cdn_http_status: integer — HTTP status of a GET to cdn_url (must be 200)
manifest_schema.page: string — which page this image belongs to
manifest_schema.embedded_in_html: boolean — true if an tag was spliced into the page HTML

image_manifest_non_empty.non_gate: Storage of the image file on disk is NOT verification. The CDN URL must return HTTP 200 and the tag must be present in the saved page HTML. 'Images folder exists but is empty' is the same as 'no image pipeline ran' — hard FAIL.
image_manifest_non_empty.ci_mode: In hermetic CI the guard checks only that this gate entry exists with required:true. The manifest contents are checked at live-run time by ghl_gate require-pass.

verify_gate_authoritative._doc: PLAN-2 backstop — The authoritative pass gate. A build's overall PASS/FAIL verdict comes from ONE source only: ghl_verify.verify_all (which calls ghl_builder.verify_url for each page — HTTP 200 AND marker in the rendered body at the /preview/<pageId> URL). No other source may issue a PASS verdict. Enforced by guard-ghl-verify-unfakeable.sh (static) and ghl_gate.py require-pass (runtime).
verify_gate_authoritative.pass_criterion: HTTP 200 AND marker present in the RENDERED body of the public /preview/<pageId> URL. Both conditions must be true. Neither alone is sufficient.

non_gates.marker_in_storage: NOT a gate. 'The marker text is present in the stored Firebase/storage blob' proves only that bytes were uploaded, not that the page renders. A page can have the marker in storage AND return HTTP 500 on load — which is exactly what happened in the 2026-06-26 pre-flight. This string is BANNED as a pass criterion in all tools/*.py.
non_gates.http_201_on_save: NOT a gate. A 201 response from the GoHighLevel autosave endpoint proves only that the server accepted the bytes, not that the page renders. The pre-flight mis-read a 201 as proof of a working page.
non_gates.api_difference_rationalization: NOT a gate. Calling an HTTP 500 an 'API difference' does not make it a pass. A 500 is always a FAIL. This string is BANNED as a rationalization in all tools/*.py.
non_gates.hand_written_ledger: NOT a gate. A ledger.json written by hand (not derived from ghl_verify.verify_all raw results) cannot issue a PASS verdict. The QC gate reads ghl_verify's outputs only.

verify_gate_authoritative.verdict_chain: ghl_verify.verify_all -> writes logs/final-preview-verify.json (raw) -> derives scorecard/verify-summary.json -> assert_consistent (FAIL LOUD if summary > raw) -> ghl_gate require-pass reads summary and raw, re-asserts consistency, exits non-zero on FAIL. This chain cannot be short-circuited.
